title: FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: KLAMATH & LAKE COMMUNITY ACTION SERVICES FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resources and referrals, family development support, one-on-one mentoring, and parenting/life skills workshop groups. 2316 South 6th Street Suite B Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Must meet one of the following: -Households receive Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF) or Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) -Household has at least one minor child in the home -Co-parenting or having visitation with a minor child -Applicant needs a parenting class certificate Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4pm, closed all federal holidays Email (541) 882-3500 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 882-3500 Deana Palazzolo [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement. Forms available in English and Spanish. AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties Services: Family Support Centers/Outreach Parenting Skills Classes Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - KLAMATH & LAKE COMMUNITY ACTION HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTAL ASSISTANCE MONEY MANAGEMENT - REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH & LAKE COMMUNITY ACTION SERVICES
